reputation: Known for aggressive but fair deal-making
Strong track record in infrastructure and energy sector M&A
Sensitive to press coverage — any scandal or public dispute is to be avoided
Prides itself on long-term client relationships over short-term wins
policies: All fee arrangements must be approved by the Managing Partner before finalisation
No party to a deal may receive undisclosed benefits or side arrangements
Confidentiality obligations survive termination of any engagement
External counsel must be instructed before agreeing to any indemnity cap exceeding £5m
ways_of_working: Prefers structured term sheets before moving to full contract drafting
Expects counterparties to come prepared with written positions
Does not negotiate on weekends unless a deadline is formally declared
Internal sign-off required on any material concession — may need to pause and revert
prohibited_behaviours: Making threats of litigation as a negotiating tactic without board approval
Sharing privileged client information to gain leverage
Misrepresenting a client's financial position or authority to commit
